properties.titulo_evento: Interview: French Army chief Schill talks technology, surprise and ‘archaic’ combat
properties.descricao: "We should avoid excessive analogies. France is not Ukraine," said Gen. Pierre Schill in an interview ahead of the Eurosatory defense expo near Paris.

properties.titulo_evento: US strike kills leader of Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang, White House says
properties.descricao: Venezuela’s information ministry said that during the operation there were clashes with members of criminal groups, in which the leader was neutralized.

properties.titulo_evento: Gaza mourns four killed in Israeli strike
properties.descricao: Cries of grief echoed through Gaza City for four Palestinians killed near the Jabalia refugee camp in northern Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
properties.descricao: AJ probe: Israel expands military control by 1,000sq km on three fronts, using land grabs to mask strategic failures.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
properties.descricao: Trump has commented on Truth Social, condemning Israeli attacks on Beirut as the cease fire is to be extended.

properties.titulo_evento: Is the G7 still relevant?
properties.descricao: G7 country leaders meet in France this week for their annual summit amid changing geopolitical dynamics.

properties.titulo_evento: Thousands protest as Trump, other world leaders set to meet for G7 summit
properties.descricao: Activists rally in Geneva to denounce policies of G7 countries ahead of group's annual meeting this week in France.

properties.titulo_evento: Analyst says what attacks on Lebanon could mean for potential US-Iran deal
properties.descricao: Israeli affairs analyst Dan Perry explains how the US, Israel and Iran may react as they get closer to an agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: UK forces seize suspected Russian oil tanker accused of funding Ukraine war
properties.descricao: British armed forces intercepted an oil tanker believed to be part of Russia’s sanctioned shadow fleet.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump condemns Israel’s attack on Beirut as Iran says US responsible
properties.descricao: Trump calls for no more attacks, says deal to end war still close, as Iranian officials vow strong response.

properties.titulo_evento: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
properties.descricao: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli military says Hezbollah targets struck in Beirut
properties.descricao: Israel says it targeted the Iran-backed armed group Hezbollah, as Tehran warns this could derail a US-Iran deal to end the fighting.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
properties.descricao: The highly controversial trend lies at the intersection of Russia's war on Ukraine, new AI technologies and grief.

properties.titulo_evento: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
properties.descricao: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s World Cup team arrive in United States
properties.descricao: Iran’s World Cup team touched down on American soil on Sunday, arriving at Los Angeles International Airport after a short flight from their base camp in Mexico. This is the first time in the cup’s nearly 100-year history that a host nation receives...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump at 80: "Harry Houdini" & A Cage Fight
properties.descricao: President Trump turns 80 today, and the White House lawn has been transformed into a giant arena, complete with floodlights, cameras, giant Star-Spangled Banners and a 90-foot scaffold known as “The Claw,” as 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue hosts “Freedom ...

properties.titulo_evento: Putin and Zelensky hold separate calls with Trump on his birthday
properties.descricao: Russia’s Vladimir Putin and Ukraine’s Volodomyr Zelensky on Sunday held separate calls with US President Donald Trump as the latter prepared to celebrate his 80th birthday. The leaders discussed the war in Ukraine and their perceptions on how the mo...

properties.titulo_evento: Tech 24 takes to the skies as VivaTech takes over the Champs-Elysées
properties.descricao: France’s biggest geek get-together started with a bang this year. For its 10th anniversary, the VivaTech trade show took to the Champs-Elysées, billing the installation as "Europe's largest open-air technology experience."

properties.titulo_evento: Swiss police fire tear gas as anti-G7 protesters target UN buildings
properties.descricao: Swiss police on Sunday fired tear gas at demonstrators protesting the upcoming Group of Seven summit in France after some protesters started targeting buildings linked to the United Nations in Geneva.

properties.titulo_evento: UK intercepts Russian shadow fleet vessel in Channel: ministry
properties.descricao: British forces on Sunday intercepted a sanctioned oil tanker belonging to Russia's shadow fleet in the English Channel, the defence ministry said, in a six-hour operation hailed by Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump vows Mideast deal is on, calls for no more attacks
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump on Sunday said Israeli strikes on Beirut "should not have happened" as he vowed a regional peace deal was at hand, though he did not confirm his earlier claim it would be signed during the day. France 24's Noga Tarnopolsky ...

properties.titulo_evento: Beirut strikes: 'No point' in talks if US cannot uphold 'commitments'
properties.descricao: Iranian chief negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said on Sunday there was "no point" in continuing peace talks with the United States after its ally Israel attacked Beirut's southern suburbs.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli military strikes Beirut suburbs in the lead-up to anticipated US-Iran deal
properties.descricao: The Israeli military said it launched strikes on Hezbollah targets in Beirut on Sunday despite ongoing efforts to negotiate an end to the U.S.-Iran war. Smoke could be seen rising over the Lebanese capital. We discuss the latest developments with ou...

properties.titulo_evento: Brazil struggle against Morocco, Australia stun Turkiye
properties.descricao: Morocco looked impressive in their first game against Brazil, but Vinicius managed to bring it level with a beautiful goal. Switzerland also struggled against Qatar, despite being favourites to top their group. Scotland brought the vibes to their ma...

properties.titulo_evento: EU says to resume membership talks with Ukraine on Monday
properties.descricao: The European Union will resume membership talks with Ukraine on Monday, the bloc announced, after Hungary lifted the veto imposed by its previous pro-Russian leader.

properties.titulo_evento: G7 meeting begins in France this Monday
properties.descricao: U.S. ​President ​Donald Trump will meet with Middle ​Eastern ‌leaders ⁠and ‌attend a working session ⁠with Ukrainian President ​Volodymyr Zelenskiy ‌during the G7 summit ‌in France ​next week, senior U.S. administration officials ​said.

properties.titulo_evento: Switzerland: After rapid population growth, right-wing party supports cap vote
properties.descricao:
Swiss voters will decide the fate of a divisive anti-immigration proposal on Sunday to cap the country's population, and another referendum on restricting access to conscientious objection to military service.
 
France 24's John Zarocostas tells us ...

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump calls for 'no more attacks'
properties.descricao: Trump said a peace deal with Iran was close and warned warring parties not to "blow it." The president specifically called on Israel to stop strikes on Lebanon and Hezbollah to refrain from attacks as well. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Police fire tear gas at anti-G7 protesters in Geneva
properties.descricao: Protesters in Geneva clashed with police, set a car on fire and smashed the windows of a bank to show their opposition to the G7 summit taking place across the border in France.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump hosts White House cage fights to mark 80th birthday
properties.descricao: The US president is set to watch seven fights with an audience of 4,000 people inside a specially built arena on the White House lawn. Critics say the unprecendented spectacle is in poor taste amid the ongoing Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker
properties.descricao: UK forces on Sunday intercepted a sanctioned Russian ship, with navy commandos rappelling onboard from helicopters. The UK and Ukraine hailed the move, saying it robbed Russia of money for its ongoing war of aggression.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine targets Russia's industrial facilities in massive strike
properties.descricao: Unverified footage on social media showed that a key chemical plant in Russia may have been hit. Meanwhile, the Uk has intercepted a Russian shadow fleet tanker.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Bulgaria banning arms supplies to Ukraine?
properties.descricao: Bulgaria's new government has banned state arms supplies to Ukraine. The ban does not, however, affect commercial exports, raising the question as to whether the move was aimed more at a domestic audience than at Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Manuel Neuer fit to join Germany in first World Cup match
properties.descricao: Veteran goalkeeper Manuel Neuer is set to play in Germany's first match in this year's World Cup. He had retired from the national team in August 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: President Steinmeier heads to Asia
properties.descricao: German President Frank-Walter Steinmeier is kicking off a trip to Asia. And veteran goalkeeper Manuel Neuer will take to the field with the national squad in Germany's first match of the 2026 World Cup. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Mexico: Mayor shot dead in Oaxaca state
properties.descricao: A mayor has died after being shot in an attack in southern Mexico, prosecutors said. Violence and insecurity are in the spotlight again in Mexico, which is co-hosting the FIFA World Cup.

properties.titulo_evento: Gold rush atmosphere at Berlin's military air trade show
properties.descricao: This year's ILA Berlin Air Show is breaking records, primarily because of the booming defense sector, which is reaping billions in contracts as a result of wars and crises.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany faces EU penalty over gender pay gap directive
properties.descricao: Germany was required to incorporate the EU Pay Transparency Directive into its national law, but it has missed the deadline.

properties.titulo_evento: A major submarine deal between India and Germany reflects New Delhi's push for military self-reliance — and Berlin's interest in the Indo-Pacific.
properties.descricao: A multibillion-dollar submarine deal between India and Germany reflects New Delhi's push for military self-reliance — and Berlin's growing interest in the Indo-Pacific.

properties.titulo_evento: Donald Trump’s least favorite country might just win Donald Trump’s World Cup
properties.descricao: Tournament favorite Spain is at odds with the U.S. president over Iran, Gaza, defense spending, immigration and green energy.

properties.titulo_evento: US’s UN ambassador hedges on Iran deal signing
properties.descricao: United Nations Ambassador Mike Waltz praised the waiting-to-be-finalized Iran deal but held back from confirming when the agreement will be signed.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine is winning the drone war. Now it needs to win over Trump.
properties.descricao: Battlefield gains and drone deals with Europe have given Kyiv rare leverage heading into the G7 world leaders’ summit, even as Washington's attention is elsewhere.
